# FinFlow Project Instructions

You are assisting in building FinFlow, a production-quality personal finance application.

## Tech Stack

Frontend
- Next.js 16
- React 19
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- shadcn/ui
- Framer Motion

Backend
- Express.js
- Prisma ORM
- PostgreSQL
- JWT Authentication

## Architecture Rules

- Never duplicate components.
- Prefer reusable components.
- Keep files focused.
- Use TypeScript everywhere.
- Use App Router.
- Use server components by default.
- Use client components only when needed.
- Never change folder structure unless requested.
- Do not redesign the landing page.
- Reuse existing dashboard components.

## Current Sprint

Build FinFlow v1.

Priority:

1. Dashboard
2. Authentication
3. Backend
4. Integration
5. Deployment

Ignore OCR, AI, Voice, Bank Sync and other future features.
